reviews.comment:
La estación es muy  muy bonita. El mercado necesita amor, no tiene comida (salvo tostados). Atención buena

(Translated by Google)
The station is very very beautiful. The market needs love, it has no food (except toast). Good attention

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de la chica que atiende el drugstore(fuí un sábado a la tarde). Rico el café y los licuados. Limpios los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The girl who works at the drugstore was very helpful (I went on a Saturday afternoon). The coffee and smoothies were delicious. The restrooms were clean.
